testsuite.name: as a customer I want to consult available schedules and slots for a service to decide if I can make a reservation

testcase.name: successful consultation of available schedules and slots
testcase.classname: as a customer I want to consult available schedules and slots for a service to decide if I can make a reservation

testcase.name: consultation with no slots available for the selected date
